settings.languageHint: Interface language. Detected from your OS on first run; more of the app is translated over time.
settings.subtitle: Configure backend services, voice profiles, and system settings.

privacy.title: Privacy & Crash Reporting
privacy.intro: Anonymous crash reports help us catch and fix bugs in the alpha faster. No content, file paths, or credentials are ever sent — only the exception type, stack trace, and app version. You can opt out at any time.
privacy.sendReportsHint: When enabled, exceptions in the backend, frontend, and desktop shell are sent to the configured error-tracking backend.
privacy.noDsnConfiguredPrefix: No telemetry backend is configured. Set
privacy.noDsnConfiguredSuffix: to point at your Sentry or Glitchtip project to enable crash reporting.

diagnostics.title: Support Diagnostics
diagnostics.intro: Download a ZIP bundle to send to support when reporting an issue. The bundle contains redacted configuration, health status, recent logs, system info, and the current database revision.

bundle.configPrefix: all settings with secrets replaced by
bundle.logs: last 1000 log lines (if a log file is configured)

dangerZone.title: Danger zone
dangerZone.intro: These actions can’t be undone. Always take a backup first (Settings → Backup → Create backup).

wipe.label: Wipe storage
wipe.description: Deletes every generated file (voice clips, scenes, renders, thumbnails, intermediate caches) from the storage directory. Database rows that reference those files are left untouched — use <1>Reset database</1> for a coordinated wipe of both.
wipe.warning: This permanently deletes every generated file under the storage directory. <1>There is no undo</1> — restore from a backup if you change your mind.
consequences: All voice clips, scenes, renders, thumbnails, and caches are deleted
Database rows referencing those files remain (broken thumbnails until re-rendered)
Re-generation cost is incurred for anything you want back

reset.label: Reset database
reset.description: Truncates every user-data table (episodes, series, jobs, scheduled posts, integrations, API keys, voice/LLM/ComfyUI configs). You stay signed in — auth, license, and migration tracking are preserved.
reset.warning: This truncates every user-data table. You stay signed in, but every episode, series, scheduled post, and saved configuration is gone.<1> There is no undo</1> — restore from a backup if you change your mind.
consequences: All episodes, series, generation jobs, and scheduled posts are removed
All saved API keys, voice profiles, LLM configs, ComfyUI servers are deleted
All connected social platforms are forgotten (you’ll need to reconnect)
The page reloads so cached queries don’t resurrect anything
reset.toastSuccessDesc: {{count}} tables cleared. You're still signed in.

delete.label: Delete account
delete.descriptionOwner: Owner accounts can’t be deleted from this device — the install would be unrecoverable. Use Reset database to clear content instead.
delete.description: Permanently deletes this user account from the install and signs you out. Content you authored stays under its original owner.
delete.warning: This permanently deletes <1>{{email}}</1> from the install and signs you out.<2> There is no undo.</2>
consequences: Future sign-ins for this email will fail until the account is re-created
Content authored by this user stays in the install (no cascade)

storage.nearlyEmptyLead: Storage is nearly empty. If you copied media files to your host, make sure the destination is
storage.nearlyEmptyTail: — the app only sees files under the bind-mounted directory. Copying elsewhere (e.g. a sibling folder with a different case, or a drive the compose file doesn't map) won't be picked up.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.intro: Theme presets bundle accent color, display font, border radius, and shadow style. Mode (dark/light) and Activity Monitor position are independent choices.
appearance.currentlyLight: Currently light — high contrast for bright studios.
appearance.currentlyDark: Currently dark — easier on the eyes for long sessions.
appearance.themePresetIntro: Pick a mood — each preset changes fonts, colors, radii, shadows, and icon weight together. Click a card to apply instantly.
appearance.dockIntro: Where the background-jobs bar lives. Top/bottom show a compact tray; left/right show a collapsible full-height rail.

dock.bottomHelp: Classic task-bar strip across the bottom.

palette.placeholder: Jump to a page or action…

channels.intro: Connect the platforms you publish to. Connected channels can be scheduled from the Calendar and targeted by a series.
